fishing rod.message: You bought a 🎣! If you didn't have one before, now you can do `bb fish`.
fishing rod.description: Allows you to use the command `fish`. Collect fish to keep as trophies or sell for more BARREL_COIN

dagger.message: You bought a 🗡️! If you didn't have one before, you can now try to rob people. Be warned, though: the life of crime isn't kind.
dagger.description: Allows you to try to rob other people.

shield.message: You bought a 🛡️! If you didn't have one before, you're now mostly protected against people trying to rob you.
shield.description: Does a good job of blocking you from getting robbed.

house.message: You bought a 🏠! Being a landlord is so much fun!
house.description: Become a landlord and extort your tenants. Buying a house resets your rent timer.
